replies.msg: one of the reason to create world channel is to let more foreigner understand our belief behind our action.  the fundamental element of democracy is to repect different perspective / opinions.
Be a wise people, need to understand the full picture of everything instead of unwilling to hear xxx & xxx & leaving comments with bias

Just explain to him the difficulties of being a “Front-liner”. They are literally just normal citizens trying to stand up for what they believe in, and there are no real leaders/organisations supporting their actions.

It is especially difficult to keep a cool head when disguised police and wumaos are constantly interfering with internal communication, doing things way over the line and causing arguments.

Front-liners are always trying to improve and are continuously evaluating their actions, but there is only so much you can do when you’re forced to trust/doubt everyone around you.

okay you may say they’ve destroyed some of the publish facilities, eg MTR, Chinese banks, shops.. hang on & think about it - those are gov/CCP/gangster related facilities.

for MTR, they should take their social responsibility as a mass transportation in HK but unfortunately they don’t since 825 - transporting police and block the railways anytime they want, ppl can’t never leave safely after the march.

2/ do not make nearby innocent ppl injured
3/ do not make fake news
